'''lolataka''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Adjectives|adjective]] meaning "[[Wikt:eosinophilous|eosinophilous]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| l-l-t
|-
! Word class
| [[Adjective]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:eosinophilous|eosinophilous]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| lolataka
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
''Positive degree, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:lolatithi|lolatithi]] || [[word:lolatiji|lolatiji]] || [[word:lolatishi|lolatishi]] || [[word:lolatiki|lolatiki]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:lolatuthuthu|lolatuthuthu]] || [[word:lolatujuju|lolatujuju]] || [[word:lolatushushu|lolatushushu]] || [[word:lolatukuku|lolatukuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:lolatuthu|lolatuthu]] || [[word:lolatuju|lolatuju]] || [[word:lolatushu|lolatushu]] || [[word:lolatuku|lolatuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:lolatufthuf|lolatufthuf]] || [[word:lolatufjuf|lolatufjuf]] || [[word:lolatufshuf|lolatufshuf]] || [[word:lolatufkuf|lolatufkuf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:lolatethe|lolatethe]] || [[word:lolateje|lolateje]] || [[word:lolateshe|lolateshe]] || [[word:lolateke|lolateke]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:lolatothotho|lolatothotho]] || [[word:lolatojojo|lolatojojo]] || [[word:lolatoshosho|lolatoshosho]] || [[word:lolatokoko|lolatokoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:lolatotho|lolatotho]] || [[word:lolatojo|lolatojo]] || [[word:lolatosho|lolatosho]] || [[word:lolatoko|lolatoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:lolatofthof|lolatofthof]] || [[word:lolatofjof|lolatofjof]] || [[word:lolatofshof|lolatofshof]] || [[word:lolatofkof|lolatofkof]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[collective]] || [[word:lolatÃŸfthÃŸf|lolatÃŸfthÃŸf]] || [[word:lolatÃŸfjÃŸf|lolatÃŸfjÃŸf]] || [[word:lolatÃŸfshÃŸf|lolatÃŸfshÃŸf]] || [[word:lolatÃŸfkÃŸf|lolatÃŸfkÃŸf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[plural]] || [[word:lolatÃŸfthÃŸfthÃŸf|lolatÃŸfthÃŸfthÃŸf]] || [[word:lolatÃŸfjÃŸfjÃŸf|lolatÃŸfjÃŸfjÃŸf]] || [[word:lolatÃŸfshÃŸfshÃŸf|lolatÃŸfshÃŸfshÃŸf]] || [[word:lolatÃŸfkÃŸfkÃŸf|lolatÃŸfkÃŸfkÃŸf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[singular]] || [[word:lolatÃŸfthÃŸf|lolatÃŸfthÃŸf]] || [[word:lolatÃŸfjÃŸf|lolatÃŸfjÃŸf]] || [[word:lolatÃŸfshÃŸf|lolatÃŸfshÃŸf]] || [[word:lolatÃŸfkÃŸf|lolatÃŸfkÃŸf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[zero]] || [[word:lolatÃŸfthÃŸf|lolatÃŸfthÃŸf]] || [[word:lolatÃŸfjÃŸf|lolatÃŸfjÃŸf]] || [[word:lolatÃŸfshÃŸf|lolatÃŸfshÃŸf]] || [[word:lolatÃŸfkÃŸf|lolatÃŸfkÃŸf]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:lolatÃḊthÃḊ|lolatÃḊthÃḊ]] || [[word:lolatÃḊjÃḊ|lolatÃḊjÃḊ]] || [[word:lolatÃḊshÃḊ|lolatÃḊshÃḊ]] || [[word:lolatÃḊkÃḊ|lolatÃḊkÃḊ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:lolatathatha|lolatathatha]] || [[word:lolatajaja|lolatajaja]] || [[word:lolatashasha|lolatashasha]] || [[word:lolatakaka|lolatakaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:lolatatha|lolatatha]] || [[word:lolataja|lolataja]] || [[word:lolatasha|lolatasha]] || [[word:lolataka|lolataka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:lolatafthaf|lolatafthaf]] || [[word:lolatafjaf|lolatafjaf]] || [[word:lolatafshaf|lolatafshaf]] || [[word:lolatafkaf|lolatafkaf]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[positive]].none || [[word:lolatasha|lolatasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[visual]] || [[word:lolatshÃḋsha|lolatshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:lolatrosha|lolatrosha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[inferential]] || [[word:lolatmusha|lolatmusha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[optative]] || [[word:lolatyasha|lolatyasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gololatnkshÃḋsha|gololatnkshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gololatnkrosha|gololatnkrosha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gololatnkmusha|gololatnkmusha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gololatnkyasha|gololatnkyasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].none || [[word:lolalatasha|lolalatasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[visual]] || [[word:lolalatshÃḋsha|lolalatshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:lolalatrosha|lolalatrosha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:lolalatmusha|lolalatmusha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[optative]] || [[word:lolalatyasha|lolalatyasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gololalatnkshÃḋsha|gololalatnkshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gololalatnkrosha|gololalatnkrosha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gololalatnkmusha|gololalatnkmusha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gololalatnkyasha|gololalatnkyasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].none || [[word:lelÃḊtasha|lelÃḊtasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[visual]] || [[word:lelÃḊtshÃḋsha|lelÃḊtshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:lelÃḊtrosha|lelÃḊtrosha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:lelÃḊtmusha|lelÃḊtmusha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[optative]] || [[word:lelÃḊtyasha|lelÃḊtyasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:golelÃḊtnkshÃḋsha|golelÃḊtnkshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:golelÃḊtnkrosha|golelÃḊtnkrosha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:golelÃḊtnkmusha|golelÃḊtnkmusha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:golelÃḊtnkyasha|golelÃḊtnkyasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].none || [[word:lolfatasha|lolfatasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[visual]] || [[word:lolfatshÃḋsha|lolfatshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:lolfatrosha|lolfatrosha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:lolfatmusha|lolfatmusha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[optative]] || [[word:lolfatyasha|lolfatyasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gololfatnkshÃḋsha|gololfatnkshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gololfatnkrosha|gololfatnkrosha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gololfatnkmusha|gololfatnkmusha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gololfatnkyasha|gololfatnkyasha]]
|}

''36 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|97f1258}}
